'''√f-g-zh''' ('''kafagazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dearn|dearn]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-g-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dearn|dearn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √f-g-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kafagazh
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thifagazh || jifagazh || shifagazh || kifagazh
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthufagazh || jujufagazh || shushufagazh || kukufagazh
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thufagazh || jufagazh || shufagazh || kufagazh
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thufagazh || jufagazh || shufagazh || kufagazh
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thefagazh || jefagazh || shefagazh || kefagazh
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothofagazh || jojofagazh || shoshofagazh || kokofagazh
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thofagazh || jofagazh || shofagazh || kofagazh
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thofagazh || jofagazh || shofagazh || kofagazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || fagazh || fagazh || fagazh || fagazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || fagazh || fagazh || fagazh || fagazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || fagazh || fagazh || fagazh || fagazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || fagazh || fagazh || fagazh || fagazh
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæfagazh || jæfagazh || shæfagazh || kæfagazh
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathafagazh || jajafagazh || shashafagazh || kakafagazh
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thafagazh || jafagazh || shafagazh || kafagazh
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thafagazh || jafagazh || shafagazh || kafagazh
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shafagazh
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshafagazh
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishafagazh
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shafagazhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshafagazhnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishafagazhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shafagazhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshafagazhnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishafagazhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shafagazhro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshafagazhnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishafagazhro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shafagazhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshafagazhnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishafagazhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shafagazhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshafagazhnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishafagazhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shafagazhng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshafagazhnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishafagazhng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shafagazhya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshafagazhnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishafagazhya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shafagazhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshafagazhnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishafagazhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shafagazhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshafagazhnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishafagazhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shafagazhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshafagazhnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishafagazhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shafagazhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshafagazhnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishafagazhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shafagazhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshafagazhnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishafagazhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shafagazhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshafagazhnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishafagazhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shafagazhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshafagazhnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishafagazhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shafagazhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshafagazhnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishafagazhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shafagazhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshafagazhnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishafagazhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shafagazhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshafagazhnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishafagazhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shafagazhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshafagazhnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishafagazhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shafagazhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshafagazhnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishafagazhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shafagazhmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshafagazhnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishafagazhmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
